commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: arquitectura multi-nicho (verticales)

Convierte el sistema en una base multi-vertical reutilizable sin romper
nada del vertical actual de aspiradores.

Pipeline Python:
- build_catalog.py: --vertical flag, filtra marcas por vertical,
  output a data/<vertical>.yaml (aspiradores sigue igual)
- generar.py: --vertical flag, genera contenido en content/<vertical>/
  para verticales no-root, añade vertical+type al front matter
- sync_ofertas.py: --vertical flag, lee data/<vertical>.yaml

Datos:
- data/verticals.yaml: define verticales activos (aspiradores root=true)
- Marcas sin campo vertical asumen aspiradores por defecto

Hugo layouts:
- Todos los templates usan index site.Data (.Params.vertical | default "aspiradores")
  en lugar de site.Data.aspiradores (100% backwards compatible)
- baseof.html: eq .Type "modelos" en lugar de eq .Section "modelos"
- model_crosslinks.html: URLs vertical-aware via partial vertical_urls.html
- search.html: indexa todos los verticales activos automáticamente
- index.html: muestra sección "Otros nichos" si hay verticales no-root

Para añadir un nuevo nicho:
1. Añadir vertical en data/verticals.yaml (root: false)
2. Añadir marcas/modelos en catalog_brands.yaml con vertical: <key>
3. python tools/build_catalog.py --vertical <key>
4. python tools/generar.py --vertical <key>
5. python tools/sync_ofertas.py --vertical <key>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(errors): DeltaErrorを個別エラー型に分離し関数シグネチャのエラー型を限定

各エラー種別を独立した型(StoreError, VersionNotFoundError等)として定義し、
DeltaErrorをそれらのユニオン型として構成する。

関数の返り値型を実際に発生しうるエラーのみに限定:
- DeltaStore: StoreError
- LogReader.readVersion: VersionNotFoundError | InvalidLogEntryError
- LogReader.listVersions: StoreError
- LogReader.latestVersion: StoreError | LogNotFoundError
- CheckpointReader.readCheckpoint: CheckpointReadError
- LogReplay.buildSnapshot: BuildSnapshotError (5種)
- LogReplay.buildLatestSnapshot: StoreError | BuildSnapshotError
- DeltaTable.open: OpenError (7種)
- DeltaTable.atVersion: AtVersionError (5種)

commit.message:
implement design improvements: correctness, accuracy, and usability

Correctness (Priority 1):
- Verification pass now uses None sentinel when verifier skips a finding
  instead of silently defaulting confirmed=True; prints [WARN] to stderr
  and tracks a total_unverified counter in the final summary
- compare_report_to_golden() now indexes cross_function findings using
  (frozenset(functions_involved), CWE_ID) keys so network_parser and
  session_mgr golden samples are correctly compared; adds 3 new tests

Analysis accuracy (Priority 2):
- _classify_function_role() strips string literals and comments before
  running alloc/free regexes to prevent false ALLOCATES/FREES labels
- Expand pycparser fake typedef list with va_list, ptrdiff_t, intptr_t,
  uintptr_t, pid_t, socklen_t, off_t, time_t, wchar_t to reduce the
  frequency of the regex fallback on standard C code
- FILE markers now store os.path.relpath() instead of os.path.basename()
  so two files with the same name in different directories are distinguished

Usability (Priority 3):
- API_TIMEOUT reads from API_TIMEOUT_SECS env var (default 300)
- Missing #include "..." files now emit [WARN] to stderr
- --cluster-size N and --timeout N CLI flags exposed in argparse and
  threaded through to build_call_clusters() and llm_client.API_TIMEOUT
- README updated: new features, API_TIMEOUT_SECS env var table entry,
  --cluster-size/--timeout usage examples, confirmed=null sentinel docs,
  expanded typedef list and _classify_function_role() descriptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix negation operators failing in zsh due to BANG_HIST escaping

Handle \! in the lexer (zsh escapes ! to \! due to BANG_HIST), which
previously caused an "unexpected character" error for !=, !(expr), and
!contains(). Also support NOT keyword in WHERE clauses as alternative
to ! operator.

commit.message:
refactor: migrate application code to src/ directory (#30)

* feat: modernize charts, fix inline URLs, and enforce sequential tool execution

- Modernize chart appearance: varied color palette, rounded bars, no borders,
  white labels, dashed grid lines, donut padding, gentle animations
- Add keyLabels and valueFormat fields to bar/line chart schemas for explicit
  Hebrew labels and percentage formatting
- Prevent agents from writing inline URLs (auto-resolved from tool results)
- Enforce sequential execution: sub-agents must complete before chart tools
- Add interactive model cost comparison page (public/model-comparison.html)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent 10MB body limit crash by sending only last message to server

- ChatThread: send only the last user message in POST body — Mastra's
  MessageHistory processor recalls full history from Convex automatically,
  so sending all messages was redundant and caused unbounded payload growth
- next.config: add experimental.proxyClientMaxBodySize = 25mb as safety net
- thread.service: increase client GET timeout from 10s → 30s for threads
  with multiple sub-agent enrichment round-trips
- route.ts: wrap enrichWithSubAgentData in try/catch so GET returns messages
  even if sub-agent recall fails; remove dead truncateToolResult function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: preserve delegation results in TruncateToolResultsProcessor

The processor was stripping agent-* tool invocation results to {},
removing subAgentThreadId and subAgentResourceId. This broke
enrichWithSubAgentData on GET — it couldn't find sub-agent thread
references, so no data-tool-agent parts were reconstructed, and
SourcesPart had no source URLs to display.

Skip stripping for agent-* tool invocations (delegation results are
small: text + 2 IDs) so the enrichment pipeline works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: recall messages by threadId only, ignore resourceId mismatch

Auth timing can cause messages to be stored with different resourceIds
(Clerk user ID vs guest ID fallback) within the same thread. Since each
threadId is unique per chat, filtering by resourceId is unnecessary and
caused the GET handler to return only a subset of messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: gate chat on auth loaded to prevent resourceId mismatch

Before auth loads, clerkUserId is null, causing userId to fall back to
guestId. Messages stored during this window get the wrong resourceId,
making them invisible on recall (which uses the Clerk userId).

Fix:
- Resolve userId only after isAuthLoaded (null until then)
- Gate message fetch query on userId being available
- Use a ref + function callbacks in DefaultChatTransport so headers
  and memory.resource always read the latest userId at send time
- Show skeleton while auth loads for existing chats
- Revert the unsafe "recall without resourceId" change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: adjust AmbientGlow positions in AppSidebar for improved layout

* fix: stream resumability, agent UX, and input polish

- Pre-save user message to Convex before streaming so it survives
  page refresh (Mastra's executeOnFinish is gated by !abortSignal.aborted)
- Extract suggestFollowUps logic into pure function, accept input-available
  state since it's a passthrough tool (input === output)
- Fix Redis TCP client reconnection loop causing stack overflow by
  destroying orphaned clients on connection failure
- Add routing rule to delegate to both agents on broad/exploratory questions
- Add mandatory bullet-point formatting instructions for list responses
- Prevent charts from firing before sub-agents complete on follow-ups
- Dynamic rounded-full → rounded-2xl on multiline input textarea
- Suppress submit button loading spinner on new thread mount
  (useChat resume briefly sets status to 'submitted')
- Add vitest tests for extractSuggestions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update description for AI system to enhance clarity and transparency

* refactor: migrate application code to src/ directory

Move all application directories (app, agents, components, constants,
context, hooks, lib, scripts, services, types, proxy.ts, instrumentation.ts)
into src/ following Next.js convention. Root-level dirs (convex, public,
openspec, docs) and config files stay at root.

Key config changes:
- tsconfig.json: @/* -> ./src/*, @/convex/* -> ./convex/*
- vitest configs: alias updated for src/ and convex
- components.json: shadcn CSS path updated
- package.json: eval/optimize script paths updated
- instrumentation.ts: Sentry import paths adjusted
- CLAUDE.md + openspec/project.md: docs updated

Zero application import changes — @/* alias abstraction preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add error boundaries with collapsible details and copy button

- Add route-level error.tsx for chat page to catch stream resume
  failures and render crashes without triggering global-error
- Redesign global-error.tsx with friendly card UI, retry/home buttons,
  and collapsible error details with copy-to-clipboard
- Add shared ErrorDetails component (shadcn Collapsible) for consistent
  error detail display across error boundaries
- Add onError handler to useChat to suppress stream resume errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix false indexing of common words and substring scroll-to-term bug

1. "Once" (and similar common words) were being discovered as proper
   names when they appeared mid-sentence capitalised. Added "once",
   "twice", "again", "away", "back", etc. to DEFAULT_STOPWORDS, and
   "once", "then", "now", etc. to SENTENCE_START_IGNORE.

2. scroll_to_term() used a plain substring search, so clicking "Once"
   in the PDF found "once" inside "Concerto" and scrolled to
   "Addinsell's Warsaw Concerto". Now uses FindWholeWords flag first,
   falling back to substring only as a last resort.

3. Allow italic connector words (of, and, the, ...) to extend existing
   n-grams so that italic titles like "The Sound of Music" are indexed
   as "Sound of Music" rather than split into "Sound" + "Music".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add private channels via x-slug-channel header

Any request with x-slug-channel: <secret> operates in an isolated
namespace. Channel ID is derived via UUIDv5(secret) so the secret is
never stored. Each channel gets its own ReducerState and event log at
{data_dir}/channels/{id}/events.jsonl, lazy-created on first ingest
and reloaded from disk on server restart.

CLI gets --channel <secret> (or SLUG_CHANNEL env var) as a global flag
that threads through as a default header on all requests.

Private ingests are excluded from the global SSE broadcast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

gh#28565 Fix Promotion Code Evaluation report (#22665)

* gh#28565 Add C_PromotionCode table and propagation through IC flow

Introduce structured promotion code master data (C_PromotionCode table)
to replace the unused C_Order.PromotionCode varchar field. Orders can now
reference up to two promotion codes via C_PromotionCode_ID and
C_PromotionCode2_ID FK columns, which propagate automatically through the
invoice candidate flow to invoices.

Key changes:
- C_PromotionCode table with Value, Name, ValidTo columns
- AD_Reference (Table type) for C_PromotionCode2_ID lookups
- AD_Val_Rules for date-based dropdown filtering (Order/Invoice context)
- Base window with tab, fields, UI elements, and menu entry
- C_Order, C_Invoice_Candidate, C_Invoice columns (add new FKs, drop old varchar)
- IC flow propagation (C_OrderLine_Handler, AggregationEngine, InvoiceHeaderImpl,
  InvoiceCandBLCreateInvoices, AbstractInvoiceBL)
- Duplicate validation interceptor (same code in both fields rejected)
- AD_Process for Promotion Code Evaluation report (ExportToSpreadsheetProcess)
- Unit tests and Cucumber step definitions with feature file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix cucumber compilation: promotionCodeTable init and lambda capture

- Add missing promotionCodeTable parameter to C_Invoice_Candidate_StepDef
  constructor (field was declared but never initialized)
- Capture updatedInvoiceCandidate in effectively-final local variable
  before using in lambda expressions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix review findings: report SQL function, AD metadata, test improvements

- CRIT-1: Create report.report_promotion_code_evaluation SQL function in
  metasfresh base (de.metas.fresh.base DDL)
- HIGH-1: Set IsChangeLog='Y' on C_PromotionCode table
- HIGH-2: Change ValidTo DDL from TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE to DATE
- HIGH-3: Set proper SeqNo (1050/1060) on AD_Field entries for Sales Order tab
- HIGH-4: Add setC_PromotionCode_ID/setC_PromotionCode2_ID to IInvoiceHeader
- MEDIUM-1: Assert isUserValidationError() in unit test
- MEDIUM-4: Fix comment Ref=17 to Ref=20 for Invoiced parameter
- MEDIUM-5: Use getAsOptionalLocalDate for ValidTo in step def
- Add Cucumber JavaDocs to all touched/created step definitions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Address review: PromotionCodeId, Description column, Playwright test

- Create PromotionCodeId (RepoIdAware) replacing raw int in interceptor and IC flow
- Use @Getter/@Setter in InvoiceHeaderImpl/Builder instead of manual methods
- Add optional Description column to C_PromotionCode (AD_Column + DDL + UI)
- Update report function to include promotion code descriptions
- Clean cucumber feature: use suggestValueAndName(), drop OPT./Identifier suffixes
- Add Playwright E2E test for promo code O2C lifecycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix report SQL: join IC→Invoice via C_Invoice_Line_Alloc

C_Invoice_Candidate has no direct C_Invoice_ID column.
Correct path: IC → C_Invoice_Line_Alloc → C_InvoiceLine → C_Invoice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix E2E test: increase timeouts and add robust waits

The CI environment is slower — use VERY_SLOW_ACTION_TIMEOUT (40s)
for window load, Alt+N navigation, and field visibility waits.
Wait for URL change to /window/ID/recordId after creating new record.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Rework report SQL and clean feature file per review

- Report: use LATERAL subquery to avoid cartesian product from IC→ILA→IL→Invoice joins
- Report: use order GrandTotal and invoice GrandTotal instead of SplitAmt-based calculations
- Report: filter only Completed/Closed orders (DocStatus IN CO,CL)
- Report: include Description columns for promotion codes
- Feature: remove Name from M_PriceLists, Name/ValidFrom from M_PriceList_Versions
- Feature: remove unnecessary Identifier from M_ProductPrices

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Remove unnecessary C_TaxCategory_ID.InternalName from feature

Default "Normal" is already used by the step def when column is omitted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix E2E test: use /window/new URL instead of Alt+N

Navigate directly to /window/{id}/new to create a record (proven
pattern from patch-response.spec.js) instead of relying on Alt+N
which doesn't work reliably in CI. Also use .input-field class
qualifier on field selectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix E2E: use Alt+E for PromotionCode fields (Advanced Edit)

C_PromotionCode_ID has SeqNo 1050 on both Sales Order and Invoice
windows, placing it in the Advanced Edit area. Must press Alt+E
before accessing the field selector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Fix E2E: wait for .panel-modal after Alt+E, scope fields to .panel-modal-content

The PromotionCode field (SeqNo=1050) is in the Advanced Edit modal.
Previous code pressed Alt+E but didn't wait for the modal to appear,
and searched for the field globally instead of inside .panel-modal-content.

Follow the proven pattern from patch-response.spec.js:
1. Wait for .panel-modal to be visible after Alt+E
2. Scope field selectors to .panel-modal-content
3. Wait for .panel-modal to detach after Escape

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565 Use WebAPI PATCH to set promo code instead of Advanced Edit modal

The C_PromotionCode_ID field in the Advanced Edit modal was not reachable
via DOM selectors in headless Chrome. Switch to WebAPI approach:
1. Typeahead lookup to find the promo code record
2. PATCH to set C_PromotionCode_ID on the sales order
3. getFieldData() to verify promo code on completed order and invoice

This is more reliable and still tests the full O2C propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  PromotionCode lookup typeahead

  instead of typeahead lookup; end at IC navigation (full O2C is

- PromotionCodeId.toRepoId(): return 0 (not -1) for null per ADempiere convention
- Migration 5792420: use db_alter_table(), add AD_Column_Trl + translation propagation,
  include all required boolean flags (DDL_NoForeignKey, IsAutocomplete, etc.),

Added missing IsUpdateable='Y' and IsUseDocSequence='N' values

C_PromotionCode_ID is rendered as a List widget (dropdown), not a Lookup
widget (typeahead). The previous setLookupField tried to fill() a readonly
input, causing timeout failures.

Per the WebUI design guide, promotion codes are secondary business fields
that should not appear prominently at the top of the Advanced Edit modal.

Changes:

- Invoice (167): Moved from "default" group to "advanced edit" group

Two-column layout per metasfresh WebUI design guide:

Created/Updated columns in migration scripts 5792650 and 5792670.

* add missing duplicate-promocode-check for c_invoice and improve code-cohesiveness

* gh#28565 Fix Promotion Code Evaluation report

- Fix SQL injection bug: @Invoiced/null@ passed unquoted Y/N causing
  "column n does not exist" error. Use NULLIF wrapping to properly quote.
- Add DE/EN descriptions to process element (what the report does,
  what it returns)
- Fix Invoiced parameter: was using AD_Element 348 (IsActive → "Aktiv"),
  now shows correct "Fakturiert" / "Invoiced" with proper description

  filters

Verified against local DB: all three param combinations (null, Y, N)
execute successfully.

* add missing duplicate-promocode-check for c_invoice and improve code-cohesiveness

* gh#28565 Change Invoiced param from YesNo to List dropdown

YesNo (AD_Reference_ID=20) is always Y or N — no empty state. So the
user could never see "all orders" (unchecked = N = only non-invoiced).

Changed to List (17) with AD_Reference 542074 containing Y/N entries.
When the dropdown is left empty, value is NULL → function returns all.
Updated DE/EN descriptions to reflect the three-state behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565: improve report columns — remove descriptions, add ValidTo, use translatable headers

- Remove PromotionCode1Description and PromotionCode2Description columns
- Add ValidTo dates for both promotion codes (pc1.ValidTo, pc2.ValidTo)
- Rename all SQL column aliases to AD_Element.ColumnName or AD_Message.Value
  so IsTranslateExcelHeaders produces proper DE/EN column titles
- Create AD_Messages: ValidTo2 (545641), InvoiceGrandTotal (545642)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565: fix Invoiced param translations — de_DE/de_CH still showed "Aktiv"

Previous migration (5792970) only fixed en_US. The de_DE and de_CH rows
still had Name="Aktiv" and Description="Der Eintrag ist im System aktiv"
from AD_Element 348 (IsActive). Fix to "Fakturiert" with proper description.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565: add cucumber test for promotion code evaluation report

Tests the report.report_promotion_code_evaluation() SQL function:
- Scenario 1: invoiced order with both promotion codes appears correctly
- Scenario 2: non-invoiced order with one promotion code returns IsInvoiced=N
- Scenario 3: Invoiced filter (Y/N) correctly includes/excludes orders

New step definition PromotionCodeReport_StepDef calls the SQL function
directly via JDBC and validates returned rows against test data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* gh#28565: fix cucumber promotionCodeReport GLN collision in StepDefData

The C_BPartner_Location created without GLN collided with the auto-created
default location (both had NULL GLN, same BPartnerId). Adding a distinct
GLN ensures a new location record is created, avoiding the
"already mapped to customer_1" StepDefData assertion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: IFP text parser + fix NGS grade vs NO-S species mapping (tasks 096-097)

Task 096: IFP Text Import Pipeline
- New POST /api/prices/parse-ifp-text endpoint for programmatic IFP text parsing
- Parses __PortName__ headers, grade sections, single and mixed tally lines
- Mixed tallies: one entry with tally string, longest length, summed units
- Frontend routes IFP mill + pasted text to programmatic parser (skips AI)

Task 097: Fix NGS Grade vs NO-S Species Mapping
- NGS Premium → grade='NGS PREM', species='Euro SPF' (was wrongly PREM/NO-S)
- #2 NGS / No Stamp → grade='#2 NGS', species='Euro SPF' (was wrongly #2/NO-S)
- MRNS (Mill Run No Stamp) added as its own distinct grade
- Fixed GRADE_MAP in QP Excel parser, CWP PDF parser, and AI system prompt
- Added NGS PREM, #2 NGS, MRNS to SPF_GRADES and GRADE_SORT_ORDER
- DB migration fixes existing Euro mill_prices with wrong species

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve symlinks in markdown-viewer skill before wslpath

Windows cannot follow WSL symlinks, so ~/bin/Markpad.exe (a symlink
to ~/.dotfiles/bin/Markpad.exe) must be resolved with realpath before
passing to wslpath -w.

Tests were failing because accumulated E2E test data pushed seed
shareholders to page 2+. Now all tests use the search box to find

fix incorrect Bakkerij email (was bakkerij@janssens.be, should be

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

debug: add diagnostic logging for task_size rejection in task_pool and block_functions

Log the exact hidden_states shape, task_size, and pool config when
submit_task rejects a task for exceeding max_batch_size. Also add
DEBUG-level logging at the inference step entry point in
iterate_rpc_inference to capture batch_size, length_increment,
prefix_length, and can_merge_pools on every step.

This will surface the actual tensor shapes causing the error so we
can identify whether it is a long prompt, a decode-step accumulation
bug, or an unexpected reshape.

AI work management MCP server for Claude Code.

- 8 MCP tools: create_plan, confirm_plan, create_epic, create_task,
  create_subtask, get_tasks, update_task, get_status
- CLI with 7 commands: login, status, init, doctor, sync, verbose, config
- Semantic ticket matching for natural language references
- Anthropic AI planning (BYOK, runs locally)
- Auto-update check, X-DevTo-Version header tracking
- MIT license with trademark notice

commit.message:
Trigger redeploy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ios): stop re-requesting location permission on every map visit

Permission.location maps to "Always" on iOS, so granting "When In Use"
was never seen as .isGranted, causing the dialog to reappear each time.
Switched to Permission.locationWhenInUse and added a static cache to
skip the prompt once granted within the same app session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove Payload CMS — serve pieces from static JSON

Payload CMS v3 caused the Vercel Lambda to exceed the 250 MB unzipped
size limit. The site is a static gallery so no live CMS editing is needed.

- Replace Payload DB queries in pieces.ts with static src/data/pieces.json
- Populate pieces.json with all 9 pieces from import-pieces.ts (images
  mapped to public/images/pieces/[folder]/[filename])
- Remove withPayload() from next.config.mjs
- Remove /admin/ disallow from robots.ts
- Remove @payload-config path alias from tsconfig.json
- Remove payload, @payloadcms/*, better-sqlite3, date-fns from package.json
- Delete payload.config.ts, seed.ts, import-pieces.ts, .npmrc
- Delete src/collections/, src/app/(payload)/, src/app/api/

Build: 9 /piece/[slug] routes generated statically, 281 packages removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: adiciona download_pdf.py para baixar PDFs de portais protegidos

Script com dupla estratégia:
1. httpx com headers browser-like (User-Agent, Referer, Accept) — rápido
2. Fallback Playwright com context.request.get() — usa cookies de sessão
   do browser após navegar no referer, contorna proteções como 403 do RI do Itaú

Atualiza TOOLS.md com instruções de uso do download_pdf.py no OpenClaw.
